title: Sequential Restriction
excerpt:
Hi All, 
Is there an App in market place on monday.com which when download can create a sequential flow for column for example you column is restricted until you have update first column second thrid etc. 
Regards, 
Chet…

posts.author: Chetan213 (Chetan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,
Is there an App in market place on monday.com which when download can create a sequential flow for column for example you column is restricted until you have update first column second thrid etc.
Regards,
Chetan

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Chetan213 , I’m not aware of any apps that give the sequential columns, though if you find one, share it here as that’s a good use case. There’s a required fields app called “Required Fields Automation” and probably other similar that have cross field validation.

You could do automations for each column where if X column changes and only if W is blank, then clear column, then notify user to update W first.

Then build so then it would be if Y is changed, and only if W is blank and only if X is blank, then clear column Y and notifify user to update from W first.
